title: MonsoonCraft
description: A mod containing extra, custom functionality provided in the MonsoonCraft SMP modpack.
body:
The MonsoonCraft mod.

---

### Current Features

* Adds "Dried Hay" blocks in various forms.
* The "Compressor" block, which automatically crafts 2x2 or 3x3 recipes in it's inventory.
* Adds a new enchant, "Attraction", which instantly moves mined blocks to your inventory instead of dropping them.
* Adds the `/disposal` command, allowing you to send items to the void from anywhere.
